pi_items.source: setup_task.sh generates a policy file explicitly listing 'Role Name: External Auditor'
setup_task.sh writes the policy file directly to this path
Mapping the explicit requirements in the policy text to Redmine permission names found in lib/redmine/preparation.rb
Mapping the explicit restrictions in the policy text to Redmine permission names found in lib/redmine/preparation.rb

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an 'External Auditor' role based on a synthetic policy document at /home/ga/Documents/audit_access_policy.txt. The policy mandates 9 specific read-only permissions (including view_project, view_issue_watchers, and view_wiki_edits) and explicitly forbids adding/editing/deleting issues, logging/viewing time, and posting in forums/news. The task's metadata incompletely lists these required and forbidden permissions.
